title: Indulgent Sour Irish Jam Dumplings
description: A dense and indulgent Irish dessert featuring a tangy jam and cream cheese filling, wrapped in a gluten-free pastry dough and poached to perfection.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the gluten-free flour, granulated sugar, and unsalted butter and mix until a crumbly dough forms.
Add the egg and vanilla extract to the dough and mix until a smooth ball forms.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the chilled dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Cut out small squares of dough, about 3 inches per side.
In a small bowl, mix together the jam and Ibico until smooth.
Spoon a small amount of the jam and Ibico mixture onto one half of each dough square, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the dough square over the filling and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat with the remaining dough and filling.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and reduce the heat to a simmer.
Poach the dumplings for 5-7 minutes, or until they are cooked through and fluffy.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
Dust the dumplings with confectioners' sugar before serving.
Serve the indulgent sour Irish jam dumplings warm, garnished with fresh berries or whipped cream if desired.
